description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 3 hrs 55 mins of coding time, averaging 58 mins per day. His work was spread across 5 projects and focused mostly on Java, with additional time in Bash, Python, and Markdown. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded.
